text:

Over to Mr. openssl. 

I verified that this problem still exists in 4.2-BETA (as of today) 
if NOMANCOMPRESS is set. Would be nice if we can shake this out 
before 4.2-RELEASE... 8-) 

I'm trying to do further analysis.
